name: Antipasto De Verona
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Prosciutto or Bresaola (in thin strips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Line individual salad bowls with radicchio leaves.
2. Add equal portions of prosciutto and celery roots to each bowl.
3. Top each portion with wedges of Parmesan.
4. Season to taste with salt, freshly ground black pepper, and extra virgin olive oil.
